Bash(/bin/bash -c 'TOKEN=$\(python3 -c ""import json; f=open\(\\""$HOME/.anyscale/credentials.json\\""\); d=json.load\(f\); print\(d.get\(\\""cli_token\\""\) or d.get\(\\""token\\""\)\)""\)
curl -s -H ""Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN"" ""https://console.anyscale.com/api/v2/clouds/cld_arxhbfha7cmfpn6qcftpxjxqdc""')

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add .gitignore and remove provider binary from tracking

- Add comprehensive .gitignore for Go/Terraform provider projects
- Remove terraform-provider-anyscale binary from git tracking
- Ignore patterns include: Go build artifacts, Terraform state files,
  IDE configs, OS files, and sensitive credentials

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(/bin/bash -c 'TOKEN=$\(python3 -c ""import json; f=open\(\\""$HOME/.anyscale/credentials.json\\""\); d=json.load\(f\); print\(d.get\(\\""cli_token\\""\) or d.get\(\\""token\\""\)\)""\)
curl -s -X POST ""https://console.anyscale.com/api/v2/clouds"" \\
  -H ""Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN"" \\
  -H ""Content-Type: application/json"" \\
  -d ""{\\""name\\"":\\""terraform-gcp-test-cloud\\"",\\""provider\\"":\\""GCP\\"",\\""region\\"":\\""us-central1\\"",\\""credentials\\"":\\""projects/923099919138/locations/global/workloadIdentityPools/anyscale-test8e30-access/providers/anyscale-test8e30-access\\""}"" | python3 -m json.tool')
